task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for 2-Bedroom Loft in Chicago IL (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $750000.00 and wholesale is $600000.00. Product features: Industrial-style loft with exposed brick and 14-foot ceilings in West Loop. Reference: https://www.redfin.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for 2-Bedroom Loft in Chicago IL. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying 2-Bedroom Loft in Chicago IL. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
